title: senecio rorippifolius
intro: Senecio rorippifolius, also known as the broom senecio or broom ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Senecio rorippifolius include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications and internal remedies.
